raw_title: The Download: Earth’s rumblings, and AI for strikes on Iran
raw_content: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. Listen to Earth’s rumbling, secret soundtrack The boom of a calving glacier. The crackling rumble of a wildfire. The roar of a surging storm front. They’re the noises of the living…
generated_title: 科学家记录地球自然声音助力气候变化研究
generated_summary: MIT Technology Review报道科学家利用先进传感技术记录冰川崩裂、野火噼啪等地球自然声音，为气候变化研究提供新数据视角。
